# Pull Request

## 📋 Description

Brief description of what this PR changes on the site.

## 🎯 Type of Change

Please delete options that are not relevant:

- [ ] 🐛 Display bug fix (layout, color scheme, responsive)
- [ ] 📝 Copy fix (typos, wording — canonical strings per docs/CONTENT.md)
- [ ] 🎨 Visual/design change (read docs/DESIGN.md first)
- [ ] ♿ Accessibility improvement
- [ ] 🔧 Repo/CI maintenance

## 🔗 Related Issues

Closes #(issue number)

## ✅ Verify Checklist

Confirm you ran the checklist from AGENTS.md:

- [ ] Checked light **and** dark color scheme
- [ ] Checked 375px **and** 1280px widths
- [ ] No horizontal scroll, no console errors, no new external requests
- [ ] All links resolve

## 📸 Screenshots

For visual changes, include before/after screenshots (light + dark).
